# Niddhish Puuzhakkal

Film director, behavioral psychologist, brand strategist and author based in Mumbai, India.

## What I do
- Direct TVCs and brand films for major brands (Nike, Harley Davidson, Maruti Suzuki, Adidas, Uber, Toyota)
- Feature film director: EGO (starring Arshad Warsi, Juhi Chawla, Divya Dutta, Gauhar Khan), Palkon Pe, Canvas
- Brand strategy and creative consulting using behavioral psychology frameworks
- Author of 3 books on creativity and filmmaking

## Company
Light Seeker Films, Mumbai, India
Website: https://niddhish.com

## Credentials
- MSc Psychology
- Six Sigma Black Belt
- Project Management Professional (PMP)
- 200+ TVCs across 80+ brands
- 3 feature films
- 20+ years in film direction

## Known for
- Behavioral filmmaking: applying psychological science to commercial film direction
- The intersection of film direction and behavioral science
- Production for Nike, Harley Davidson, Maruti Suzuki, Adidas, Uber, LG, Zomato, Mastercard, Tanishq

## Contact
